questions.question: Explain the reparameterization trick in VAEs and its importance.
keyPoints: Enables gradient flow through random nodes
Separates stochastic (ϵ) and deterministic (μ, σ) components
Allows sampling via z = μ + σ⊙ϵ

questions.question: Compare and contrast VAEs and GANs in terms of architecture, training objectives, and sample quality.
